state.next-action:
Phase 42.1 is now shipped.
Completed in this session: 1. 42.1-01 - canonical config consolidation around `gad-config.toml`, with `.planning/config.json` regenerated as compatibility output 2. 42.1-02 - clarified `workspace` vs `worktree` vs `workstream` in CLI/docs and added first-class `gad worktree new` 3. 42.1-03 - reviewed live upstream GSD parity and ported stale/orphan worktree detection that fits GAD 4. 42.1-04 - retired `loop_compliance` in current self-eval output and replaced it with `framework_compliance` + `hydration` 5. 42.1-06 - captured the brood-editor / local-first project-market follow-up and fixed it to local-dev-only in its first cut
Current measured reality after the metric shift: - framework compliance: 4 / 179 completed tasks fully attributed = 2.2% - hydration overhead: 1,521,173 estimated snapshot tokens / 2,471,819 total project tokens = 61.5% - interpretation: the old loop-compliance story was flattering the framework; the new metrics show that attribution discipline is still weak and hydration cost is very high
Immediate next queue: 1. 42.2-03 - rename `sdk/skills/gad-quick-skill/` -> `sdk/skills/create-proto-skill/` 2. 42.2-04 - validator v2 file-ref dedup fix (overlapping long/short path refs) 3. 42.2-05 - whitepaper-framed /findings index copy 4. 42.2-06 - implement create-proto-skill using bulk+checkpoint pattern (decision gad-171 — LOCKED, not "design" anymore) 5. phase 42.3 (NEW) - workflows as a first-class concept: hand-authored mermaid graphs + computed actual graphs + diff on /planning (decision gad-172) 6. phase 43 / 44 / 44.5 / 45 - species rename, marketplace, brood editor, and rebrand work
Two new decisions locked this turn: - gad-171: create-proto-skill uses bulk batching with per-candidate checkpoints (PROVENANCE.md first as lock marker, SKILL.md second, skip-if-both-exist on restart). Amortizes skill-creation context across N drafts; crash-resumable. - gad-172: Workflows are a first-class GAD concept. Hand-author expected graphs (gad-loop, gad-decide, gad-evolution, gad-debug, gad-discuss-plan-execute, gad-findings), compute actual graphs from trace data (skills/agents/tool-calls already traced), render side-by-side on /planning with diff. Advisory signal only, not enforcement. Phase 42.3 owns the implementation.
Also tightened: - 44.5-02 dev-server bridge is now "accept any gad/npx in NODE_ENV=development" for the first cut. New task 44.5-02b captures the hardening pass (allow-list, arg sanitization) as a deferred follow-up.
